statusbar.logged_in: Login complete. You can now generate images.

ui.prompt_placeholder: Enter what to include in the image...
ui.negative_prompt_placeholder: Enter what to exclude from the image...
ui.character_prompt_info: Character prompt: V4 models allow you to specify multiple characters individually in an image.
ui.reset_image_size_tooltip: Restores the resulting image window to its default size
ui.char_negative_placeholder: Enter negative prompt for this character...
ui.char_max_warning: You can only add up to 6 characters.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.variety_plus_tooltip: Skip CFG in early generation stages for more diverse results

enhance.title: Image Enhance
enhance.no_image_available: No generated image available. Please generate an image first.
enhance.invalid_resolution_message:
The selected image has a resolution of {width}x{height}, which is not supported for enhancement.

NovelAI Enhancement only supports Normal resolution images:
{supported_list}

Please select an image with one of the supported resolutions.
enhance.no_metadata_message:
The selected image does not contain valid NovelAI metadata.

Enhancement requires metadata from the original generation to work correctly.

Please select an image generated by NovelAI with embedded metadata.
enhance.images_found_msg: Found {} NAI images ready for enhancement.
enhance.no_images_found: No valid NAI images found in folder
enhance.no_images_msg: No valid NAI images found in the selected folder.
enhance.no_image_loaded: Please load an image or select a folder first.

dialogs.login_welcome: Hello!\nPlease log in with your Novel AI account.
dialogs.logged_in: You are currently logged in to your Novel AI account.
dialogs.login_info: ※ Your username and password are sent only to Novel AI servers,\nnot to this app's servers.
dialogs.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
dialogs.logout_error:
An error occurred while logging out:
{}
dialogs.login_error_empty_fields: Please enter your username and password.
dialogs.login_failed: Login failed.\nPlease check your username and password.
dialogs.api_key_info: Get your Persistent API Token from NovelAI Settings → Account → "Get Persistent API Token".
dialogs.login_error_api_key_failed: API key login failed. Please check your token.
dialogs.mask_paint_instruction: Paint the areas you want to regenerate with the brush. Red areas will be inpainted.
dialogs.mask_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the entire mask?
dialogs.mask_empty_warning: Please paint at least some area for inpainting.
dialogs.mask_invert_tooltip: If checked: painted areas will be KEPT, unpainted areas will be INPAINTED\nIf unchecked: painted areas will be INPAINTED (default)

errors.title: Error
errors.network_error: Internet connection problem: Cannot connect to server. Please check your network status.
errors.auth_session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.gen_err_1: Failed to retrieve information from server.
errors.api_err_401: Authentication failed. Please log in again.
errors.api_err_402: Insufficient Anlas. Please top up and try again.
errors.api_err_429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.api_err_500: Novel AI server has an issue. Please try again later.
errors.api_err_503: Novel AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.api_err_generic:
There was a problem generating the image.

{}
errors.settings_select_min_two: Please select two or more files.

connection.network_error_detail:
Details: {}

Will automatically retry when connection is restored.
connection.network_restored_detail: You can now continue generating images.

options.anlas_resolution_warning: ※ Large and Wallpaper resolutions use Anlas. Disable to prevent accidental usage.
options.custom_resolutions_desc:
Define up to 6 custom resolutions for random generation.
※ Resolutions exceeding the default (1024x1024) will consume Anlas.

options_nav.folders_desc: Set paths for results, settings, and wildcards folders.
options_nav.filename_desc: Configure the format used for saved file names.
options_nav.generation_desc: Set default count and interval for the generation buttons.
options_nav.resolution_desc: Configure resolutions and custom resolution slots.
options_nav.interface_desc: Adjust theme, font size, and prompt color settings.
options_nav.tags_desc: Set the path for the tag auto-completion file.
options_nav.log_desc: Manage debug mode and logging settings.
